content:
First Day of Christmas: Gift Tag Giveaway

♫ On the first day of Christmas, Katie Crafts gave to me- A great giveaway with Veronica Foley! ♫

Today is December 1st, so we can finally begin the holiday season with our 12 days of Christmas. There will be a brand new post every day from now til December 12th, with exciting and fun DIYs, guest bloggers, must-have holiday recipes and of COURSE, some super amazing giveaways! To kick it off is a sweet raffle with Veronica Foley Design, who is giving away a set of her festive gift tags!

Veronica, owner and graphic designer of Veronica Foley Design, is a very talented Etsyian with a great creative eye!

“I’ve always loved paper, especially really great paper. I fell in love with the velvety soft 100% cotton savoy paper I use for my stationery when I ordered some to for wedding programs and menus for a client. I later discovered that the paper is made from remainders from the textile industry, which is pretty great, too.

I also absolutely love vintage artwork and beautiful typography, and I happen to think that when these ingredients are combined with out-of-this-world paper quality, the result is some pretty amazing stationery.”

Veronica’s gift tags are pretty perfect for our theme, since they ARE about the 12 days of Christmas! One lucky winner will receive a set of 12 retro style kraft paper tags for each of the 12 days of Christmas. The 2″ x 3.5″ tags say:

Twelve drummers drumming,
Eleven pipers piping,
Ten lords a-leaping,
Nine ladies dancing,
Eight maids a-milking,
Seven swans a-swimming,
Six geese a-laying,
Five golden rings,
Four calling birds,
Three French hens,
Two turtle doves,
And a partridge in a pear tree! 

Love the tags and don’t want to wait to see if you’re a winner? You can buy them right here! There’s even a set of greeting cards that match (pictured below)!

On to the giveaway! Enter below for your chance to win a set of twelve Christmas tags! Ends at 11:59PM ET on December 6th. Raffle open to North America only; must be 18 or older to participate. Please read all terms and conditions. Good luck, and don’t forget to check back tomorrow for another awesome Christmas related post!

a Rafflecopter giveaway
